evidence.text: Claude Code plugin for AI agent observability - LLM tracing, tool calls, multi-agent coordination, cost tracking # Agent Observability Plugin Expert guidance for instrumenting AI agents in production. This Claude Code plugin provides best practices, hooks against anti-patterns, and ready-to-use templates for observing multi-agent systems and workflows. ## Features - **14 Specialized Skills** - LLM tracing, tool calls, multi-agent coordination, cost tracking, prompt A/B testing, guardrails, decision tracing, and more - **2 AI Agents** - Codebase analyzer and instrumentation reviewer - **2 Commands** -
